extensionDescription.message: 重排 Bilibili 觀看頁，將評論放在播放器旁邊，並將影片列表放在下方。

layoutLabel.description: Accessible name for the transformed watch layout.

playerLabel.description: Accessible name for the player pane.

commentsLabel.description: Accessible name for the comment pane.

videoListsLabel.description: Accessible name for the video list dock.

turnOnLabel.description: Accessible name for enabling the transformed layout.

turnOffLabel.description: Accessible name for disabling the transformed layout.

sourceCollectionLabel.description: Label for a collection video-list source.

sourceWatchLaterLabel.description: Label for a watch-later video-list source.

sourceHistoryLabel.description: Label for a history video-list source.

sourceRecommendationsLabel.description: Label for a recommendations video-list source.

finishedProgress.description: Video card progress metadata for a completed video.

watchedProgress.description: Video card progress metadata for a partially watched video.
